segments.text: The supplies you will need for this task is a medication list.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: You will also be able to use your script, which I have here placed at my phone.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: Thank you for calling MTC Pharmacy.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: If you are calling from a physician's office, please leave your name, your office phone number, your office name, physician's name, DEA number,
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Please provide your patient's name and date of birth, medication, and instructions.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Record your message at the tone.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: When you are finished, hang up or press pound for more options.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: This is Sherry Dykes calling from Dr. Ernie Burt's office.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: Dr. Burt's DEA number is J as in Jenny, J as in Jenny, 867-5309.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: I'm calling in a prescription today for Mr. Peyton Manning.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: His first name is spelled P as in Paul, E as in Edward, Y, T as in Tom, O, N as in Nancy, and Manning, M as in Mary, A, N as in Nancy, N as in Nancy, I, N as in Nancy, G. Mr. Manning is needing his Diavan HCT 160 slash 12.5 milligrams.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: He will take that one tablet by mouth daily, number 90, with three additional refills.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: Again, that is Diavan HCT, 160-12.5 milligrams, one tablet by mouth daily, number 90, with three additional refills.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
